equipment.name: Academy Luminary
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 0,25 Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique. Vior’la Sept only.

equipment.name: For the Greater Good
equipment.desc: The model's Invocation range is increased to 36". Additionally, it may target two friendly units at the same time with each Invocation. Unique. T'au Sept only.

equipment.name: Grav-Inhibitor Field
equipment.desc: Select one enemy unit in direct base contact. The unit suffers a -1 penalty to its Initiative for the remaining battleround. Unique. Sa’cea Sept only.

equipment.name: Integrated Auxiliaries
equipment.desc: Allied units benefit of the effect from Tactical philosophies. Unique. Dal’yth Sept only.

equipment.name: Master of the Killing Blow
equipment.desc: During this model's activation, enemy units within 12" are treated as having one more Markerlight token on them than they actually do. Unique. Farsight Enclaves only.

equipment.name: Nomadic Hunter
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit may shoot "Heavy" weapons with a -1 penalty and "Rapid Fire" weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" order, and they may fire Assault weapons, Grenades, and Pistols without a to hit penalty with "Advance" and "Charge" orders. Unique. Kroot Kindred only.

equipment.name: Overdrive Power Systems
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain +1 Strength. Unique. Bork’an Sept only.
